texto: The pupil of a goat's eye is elongate like a cat's, but if you look closely you'll see that it's in the horizontal position, and if you look closer still you'll see that it's less gracefully shaped, more of a ragged slot, dirty yellow. And you'll see that the white of a goat's eye is all black.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eugene Marten: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The pupil of a goat's eye is elongate like a cat's, but if you look closely you'll see that it's …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, elimae, eugene-marten pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de eugene-marten e fiction.
